parameters.query: SELECT ks.access_token_encrypted FROM kite_sessions ks JOIN users u ON ks.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_kite_provider = true AND ks.token_expiry > NOW() LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM holdings WHERE net_quantity > 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM alerts WHERE status = 'active'
INSERT INTO staging_data (data_date, data_type, symbol, data) VALUES ($1, 'technicals', $2, $3) ON CONFLICT (data_date, data_type, symbol) DO UPDATE SET data = $3, updated_at = NOW()
